calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Concerning Division Of Assets Of Grandchildren'S Trust Among Four Separate
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Wells Fargo Bank (Co-Trustee).

The Court questions Mr. Nivens authority to consent to the petition that is filed by a single Trustee and why divide the Trust now. Mr. Skootksy stated that Wells Fargo did not act independently, that the declaration of James Nivens indicates that he was completely on board, that the Trustor's instruction is clear from the onset, that there are four separate Trusts, and that each of those Trusts have to be terminated and distributed when the Beneficiary reaches age thirty. Mr. Skootsky also stated that it is in the discretion of the Co-Trustees to separate the Trusts and that funding of the Trust came out of income. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions Concerning Division of Assets, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
